description: A university sustainability office needs three specific Emoncms feeds to be publicly accessible so an external dashboard vendor can poll them without authentication. Enable public access for the following feeds: 'campus_grid_power' (tagged 'campus_energy'), 'solar_array_output' (tagged 'campus_energy'), and 'main_hall_temperature' (tagged 'campus_environment'). Ensure only these three feeds are made public and are readable via the Emoncms public API without an API key.
